subject: The endangered general data scientist

Daily

Here's what's trending, what's new, and what you shouldn't miss.

Together with Kumo

Fresh in the last 24 hours

Today's Latest Articles

 

A Career in Data Is Not Always a Straight Line, and That’s Okay

by The TDS Editors

Read Article →

 
 

How Spreadsheets Quietly Cost Supply Chains Millions

by Samir Saci

Read Article →

 
 

Comparing Explicit Measures to Calculation Groups in Tabular Models

by Salvatore Cagliari

Read Article →

Together with Kumo

Ask billion-dollar predictive questions on your warehouse

Will they churn? Is it fraud? Traditional LLMs can't answer — they treat structured data as tokens. KumoRFM-2 beats PhD data scientists on enterprise data. Just connect your data warehouse and ask in plain English. Eg: Databricks grew lead conversion 1.2x to 6x.

Learn More

YOUR FRONT ROW SEAT

Expert Webinars

ON
DEMAND
 
 

Modernize Your Data Pipelines for AI

 

See how to modernize your stack before it falls behind. You'll learn when CDC is the right move, how to handle complex hybrid environments, and how to deliver high-speed data into Delta Lake and Iceberg via CData Sync.
 
Catch the replay →
 
May
5
 
 

From Vectors to Tensors: Expanding the Possibilities of AI Search

 

A practical primer on what tensors are, why they matter, and what they make possible — with concrete use cases across retail, life sciences, and financial services.
 
Register today →
 
May
7
 
 

Your Delivery Pipeline’s Impact on AI Productivity

 

Organizations are rapidly pouring money into AI tools, but gains aren’t showing up where it counts. Explore why AI gains stall, how pipelines absorb throughput, which Continuous Delivery capabilities matter most, and how to close the automation gap.
 
Register today →

From our partner, Cautious Optimism

Microsoft and OpenAI kiss and make up

Hyperscaler and AI labs partnerships used to be exclusive. That tactic failed when it became clear that no single cloud can support today’s AI compute demand. Consider the end of the OpenAI-Microsoft exclusivity rules as the bellwether of that era’s passing.

Read on Cautious Optimism

About this Newsletter

TDS Daily

Each day, we bring you a fresh mix of trending topics, practical tutorials, and thought-provoking reads from across the data-science landscape. Whether you're exploring machine learning, AI, or data engineering, you'll find something to spark new ideas and keep you ahead of the curve.

Also From the IMG Family

More communities worth exploring

Community-powered role and skill-based roadmaps to guide your learning journey in tech.
Subscribe

Tech news that software engineering leaders and developers actually read.
Subscribe

A modestly upbeat breakdown of what's happening with tech, business and power.

Microsoft and OpenAI kiss and make up

Hyperscaler and AI labs partnerships used to be exclusive. That tactic failed when it became clear that no single cloud can support today’s AI compute demand. Consider the end of the OpenAI-Microsoft exclusivity rules as the bellwether of that era’s passing.
